channel.title: JLT FAM Trips (LinkedIn)
channel.description: Agent FAM trip features from JLT Group … LinkedIn Business edition

item.title: Niamh's Turkey FAM trip with Holiday Best
item.description:
FAM trips do what no training deck can: they put agents in a position to recommend with genuine confidence.
Our agent Niamh Considine returned from Holiday Best's FAM trip to Turkey having toured twenty-two hotels in six days. Properties spanned the full market spectrum, from budget and family resorts through to high-end luxury, with standouts including Berry Blue Resort, Belek Beach Resort, and NG Phaselis Bay.
When asked which moment on the trip she would return to, Niamh's answer was clear: "The NG Phaselis Bay site inspection."
Twenty-two hotels seen in person. That is twenty-two properties Niamh can now match to the right client, with confidence and firsthand knowledge behind every recommendation.
This is what the JLT supplier network delivers for our agents.
